programme.title: Paterno
programme.desc: HBO Films’ PATERNO centres on Penn State’s Joe Paterno in the aftermath of the Jerry Sandusky sexual abuse scandal.

programme.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love
programme.desc: A straight-laced man tries to play the field, but discovers that his heart will always be with his wife.

programme.title: Deadwood: The Movie
programme.desc: Set in 1876, when the richest gold strike in U.S. history drew a throng of restless misfits to an outlaw settlement in the Black Hills of South Dakota.

programme.title: Surveilled
programme.desc: Documentary centered on investigative reporter Ronan Farrow takes a deep dive into the growing spies-for-hire industry.

programme.title: The Stepford Wives
programme.desc: In the town of Stepford, Nicole Kidman and Matthew Broderick find that all the women are perfect - a little too perfect.

programme.title: Superman II
programme.desc: The cosmic battle for world supremacy begins as Superman inadvertently releases three powerful exiled Kyrptonians and must stop them at all cost!

programme.title: The Leisure Class
programme.desc: The winning entry from HBO's Project Greenlight about a man trying to marry into a wealthy family and his wild, unpredictable brother who could ruin everything.

programme.title: Drop
programme.desc: Dating can be deadly. Violet's dinner with Henry is upended by a series of phone drops presenting a sinister choice: kill her date or lose her child.

programme.title: Valerie Gets A New Chapter
programme.desc: Valerie is offered a role in a new multi-cam sitcom - but is hesitant to accept when she learns it will be written by AI.

programme.title: Valerie Has A Secret
programme.desc: Valerie meets her human showrunners and tries to convince a TV vet to direct the pilot.

programme.title: Valerie Faces Reality
programme.desc: Valerie discovers that being back on a soundstage makes her miss her old sitcom team of one: Mickey - whose death she never processed.

programme.title: Valerie Does It All
programme.desc: When AI churns out an unusable script, Valerie is forced to lean into her executive producer role to do damage control.

programme.title: Episode 5
programme.desc: Explores the madness of the television world and the bravery of a tragic actress as she struggles to keep her career afloat while balancing her personal life

programme.title: Birds Of Prey (And The Fantabulous Emancipation Of One Harley Quinn)
programme.desc: Margot Robbie reprises her role as Harley Quinn in a tale as twisted as Harley herself, and told as only Harley can tell it.

programme.title: Final Destination 3
programme.desc: A high school senior has a premonition of death and manages to save her friends and herself, but death is out to take their lives.

programme.title: Bodyguard Of Lies
programme.desc: A hard-hitting look at how the Afghanistan War was sold to the public - and the deception that fueled it for two decades.

programme.title: Respect Yourself
programme.desc: Despite severe business setbacks, Stax Records rises again with Isaac Hayes’s Oscar® and Grammy®-winning work for the 1971 smash hit Shaft.

programme.title: Primo
programme.desc: In quiet but unsparing language, Primo Levi narrates the story of how he, an Italian-Jewish chemist, was captured by the Nazis and sent to Auschwitz.

programme.title: O.G.
programme.desc: O.G. follows Louis (Wright), a maximum-security prison inmate on the cusp of release from a sentence he’s served for the last 24 years.

programme.title: Superman II
programme.desc: The cosmic battle for world supremacy begins as Superman inadvertently releases three powerful exiled Kyrptonians and must stop them at all cost!

programme.title: The Leisure Class
programme.desc: The winning entry from HBO's Project Greenlight about a man trying to marry into a wealthy family and his wild, unpredictable brother who could ruin everything.

programme.title: Sugar
programme.desc: An HBO Original film of a baseball pitcher who struggles to pull his family out of poverty.

programme.title: Superman III
programme.desc: In this third instalment of this series, Superman battles a supercomputer and the evil businessman exploiting it.

programme.title: Fast & Furious
programme.desc: Vin Diesel and Paul Walker reteam for the fourth chapter of the franchise built on speed - Fast and Furious.

programme.title: Ghost Town
programme.desc: Bertram Pincus dies for seven minutes and when he wakes up, has the ability to see ghosts. Stars Ricky Gervais and Greg Kinnear.

programme.title: Run Bambi Run

programme.title: Gone Baby Gone

programme.title: Mondays At Racine

programme.title: Sept-05

programme.title: Salem's Lot

programme.title: Thomas & Friends: All Engines Go

programme.desc: Team Mekbots rescues a group of baby penguins, Nick and Nancy from a whirlpool, Opus the Kangaroo from a sugar rush and a rambunctious group of vervet monkeys from crashing the Mek Jet.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: The pups build a modular museum for River's changing art; they help Park Ranger Rose find Farmer Zoe's missing opera-singing goat, leading to building a giant alphorn for it.

programme.title: Hamsters of Hamsterdale

programme.title: PAW Patrol

programme.title: Sesame Street

programme.title: The Rewrite
programme.desc: Keith Michaels, an Oscar-winning writer, teaches at the Binghamton University on the East Coast after losing his popularity in Hollywood and falls in love with Holly, a fellow teacher.

programme.title: Laws of Attraction
programme.desc: New-York based lawyers Audrey and Daniel, who often compete against each other, get married. However, they find it difficult to learn to draw lines between their personal and professional lives.

programme.title: Forrest Gump
programme.desc: Forrest, a man with low IQ, recounts the early years of his life when he found himself in the middle of key historical events. All he wants now is to be reunited with his childhood sweetheart, Jenny.

programme.title: Sex and the City
programme.desc: After Carrie and Big decide to get married, Big becomes nervous on their wedding day when Miranda, his lover's friend, tells him about the reality of marriage out of frustration.

programme.title: Sex and the City 2
programme.desc: Carrie, Miranda and Charlotte are tired of dealing with the pressures of life and desire a break. Thus, they join their friend, Samantha, in Abu Dhabi, where her former partner is filming a movie.

programme.title: The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Milo is hired to track down his ex-wife, Nicole, for skipping bail. Subsequently, a routine retrieval turns into a deadly game of cat and mouse, forcing them both to go on the run together.

programme.title: The Terminal
programme.desc: Eastern European visitor Viktor arrives in New York, only to find that his papers are no longer valid. Rules being rules, airport chief Dixon can't let Viktor into America, or let him leave.

programme.title: Cyberchase

programme.title: Let's Go Luna!

programme.title: Phoebe & Jay
programme.desc: Phoebe and Jay are asked to bird sit; photo time leads Jay to an outfit disaster.

programme.title: Xavier Riddle and the Secret Museum

programme.title: Molly of Denali
programme.desc: Molly and Tooey decide to make a few of their own Alaska Native superheroes; Molly wants to fix up her old sled for Trini, but she's not sure she is ready to part with it.

programme.title: Alma's Way
programme.desc: Inspired by Supreme Court Justice Sonia Sotomayor, Alma tries to help her friends determine what's fair; Justice Sotomayor encourages Alma to be an umpire at a kickball game.

programme.title: Lyla in the Loop
programme.desc: Lyla and Luke make a hamster playground; the Loops family embarks on a journey to figure out why Stu keeps beeping.

programme.title: Weather Hunters
programme.desc: Benny becomes enamored with the mail carrier, and wonders how she delivers the mail in different weather conditions.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.desc: Orli takes her Odd Squad UK test; Ostin and Olyla tell the others about how they learned to love singing and dancing because of a villain.

programme.title: Wild Kratts

programme.title: Wild Kratts

programme.title: Lyla in the Loop
programme.desc: Lyla and Luke clean their room with help from Stu; Stu learns how to play hide-and-seek.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Fern and the others try to make an upset Ladonna feel better after she finds out her family will have to move.

programme.desc: Pinkalicious tries to draw Peter's portrait, but he won't sit still; Pinkalicious enjoys the singing of the Pink Peepers so much, she asks them to move in with her.

programme.desc: Kaya's cooking class; the Wombats go on a treasure hunt.

programme.title: Work It Out Wombats!
programme.desc: Wombats unstick a stuck train; the group goes to Bellyflop Lake.

programme.desc: While playing with his friends at school, Daniel decides he would like to spend some time alone; Daniel learns that when he wants to be alone, he can find a place of his very own.

programme.desc: Arugula and Carl go on an adventure as archaeologists; Carl spots a UFO on Mother's Day.

Lantern Recovery op Sean is in a race against time to get a fully loaded dual tanker off a busy stretch of motorway. And recovery

programme.title: Get Out Alive with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: In the season finale, survival expert Bear Grylls selects the winner of $500,000 after a relentless journey to New Zealand's West Coast --‐ a wet, rainforest amidst torrential downpour where only one team will “Get Out Alive”.

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: Whether you call them Pouldeau, American Coot, or Water Chickens, chances are you don't consider them a delicacy. However, Jean-Paul is out to prove that these abundant birds have a place at the dinner table. Tune in as thew crew makes some incredible gumbo while preparing for their last hunt at Duck Camp.

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: It's the final day at Duck Camp for Jean-Paul and the guys. They finish up their trip with a morning of hunting followed by an afternoon filled with crawfish and catfish. The trip ends on dry land and the crew reflects on what makes the duck camp so special.

programme.title: Strangers in Danger
programme.desc: Back in Eastern Europe, Catfish and Rooftop start their visit Ukraine dropping into the country via skydive. programme.title: The Whale Whisperer
programme.desc: This film follows the inspiring relationship between whale whisperer Vicki Neville and thehumpback whales of Australia. Never-before-seen behaviours have been documented by a team of five cinematographers over the three-month whale season in Hervey Bay, all captured in glorious 4K. These stunning close encounters capture whales like you have never seen them before!

programme.desc: Walid, tokoh berpengaruh yang disanjung, di sebalik wajah menyimpan rahsia. Apabila kebenaran terbongkar, kepercayaan hancur dan kuasa mula runtuh. Siapakah Walid sebenarnya?

programme.title: Sesaat Lebih - Trailer
programme.desc: Mengisahkan Adelia, seorang wanita berkerjaya yang kehilangan suami secara mengejut, lalu berusaha sembuh bersama anaknya dan sahabat baik arwah, menemui makna cinta dan peluang kedua dalam hidup hari ini.

programme.title: Janji Zehan-Lahzeye Bi Payan
programme.desc: A young newlywed couple, Zehan and Arman, decide to go to Shiraz in Iran for their honeymoon. But soon their fairy tale romance starts to crack as the true meaning of marriage puts their relationship to the test. Starring Nur Fazura and Amir Rezazadeh. Directed by Bernard Chauly.

programme.desc: Kaseh Ibu

programme.title: Cikgu Timah Sekolah Bandar
programme.desc: Kisah cikgu Timah yang sudah berkahwin dengan Imran dan berhijrah kembali ke Bandar. Cikgu Timah yang hamil mengalami alahan yang teruk. Pelbagai konflik telah berlaku dalam rumah tangga cikgu Timah. Haziq anak tirinya berusaha untuk memulihkan hubungan cikgu Timah serta ayahnya Imran.

programme.title: Talentime
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang sebuah pertandingan adu bakat di sekolah yang telah mempertemukan 2 orang insan dalam satu jaringan percintaan walaupun berbeza bangsa keturunan dan latar belakang keluarga.

programme.title: Satu Malam Perawan

programme.title: You Mean The World To Me
programme.desc: unny, pembuat filem pulang ke kampungnya untuk membuat filem mengenai keluarganya. Berdepan masalah kewangan, dia bersemuka dengan kebenaran tentang keluarganya dan belajar menerima peristiwa lampau.

programme.title: Good Boys Go To Heaven Ep03

programme.title: Walid Ep02
programme.desc: Walid terjerat pakatan dengan Habiburrahman yang berkarisma. Saat cita-cita memuncak di pergunungan, Ummi bangkit menuntut semula Jihad Ummah—walau terpaksa menjadi apa yang dulu ditentangnya.

programme.title: Karya 12 Vol 2: Sekolah Api

programme.title: 5 Minit
programme.desc: A young father, who had his daughter out of wedlock, relives his misspent youth while waiting the infinite 5 minutes to find out whether his own teenage, unmarried daughter is now pregnant.

programme.title: Karya 12 Vol 2: Pentas Haiwan
programme.desc: Kisah seorang guru yang menjadi guru sementara untuk mengajar kanak-kanak kelas lemah menghadapi cabaran daripada orang sekeliling dan juga pengetuanya.

programme.title: Kampung Latah Kena Kuarantin
